a5.note: Lead LEFT every set. Light, perfect arc, no hip hitch. Goal: build left to match right.

a6.note: Now possible with mini-bands. Hips stacked, toes forward.

a7.note: Kickstand RDL — hinge to ~45deg, drive through heel, soft standing knee.

a8.note: 3-sec slow lower (eccentric). Match left to right weight.

a10.note: Nordic eccentric-only: control to ~30deg, push back with hands, grow range weekly.

a11.note: TKE — key for VMO/patellar tracking. 2-sec hold at full extension, foot tripod.

a12.note: Step-Down 4-sec lower, knee over 2nd toe, no inward collapse.

b4.note: Hit 12 on all 4 sets at 100; go 105 next week if the last set is RIR2+.

b5.note: 100 felt easy — go ~110/side, lead left, full shoulder-blade retraction.

b6.note: Up from 40. Elbows wide for rear delt; last 3 reps a grind.

b7.note: Keep 50. 2-sec hold, perfect form over load.

b8.note: Find a cable, or sub a DB pullover — wasn't available last week. 3x12 light.

b9.note: Stay at 25 and brace your core (back twinged last week). Clean 3x10 before adding.

c5.note: Up from 70. 3-sec eccentric, stay at/under 90deg, start left leg.

c6.note: Up from 50. 2-sec hold at top, toe slightly out for VMO, lead left.

c7.note: HOLD 18in bodyweight — clean up the left-knee wobble before adding load/height. 4-sec lower.

c8.note: Go to 65deg (5deg deeper) for 40s x3. Pain-free is mandatory.

c9.note: Add light DBs ~15/hand if the knee is quiet. Upright torso, tripod foot.

c10.note: DO THIS with the new mini-bands — 3x12 steps/side. Knees out, feel it in the hip not the knee. This is the fix for your left-knee wobble.

c11.note: Do NOT skip again — move it earlier. Start ~30 total, hinge to hamstring stretch.

d4.note: Do this FIRST (before fly/lateral raise). 35x12 across 4 sets; go to 40 once all 4 hit 12.

d5.note: 30/arm, push to 15. Try 32.5 once 15s are clean.

d6.note: Build reps toward 15-20, then add load.

d7.note: Keep 10 — fix the left shrug first (long neck, lead with the elbow) before adding.

d8.note: NEUTRAL / hammer grip ONLY. Use a pain-free load (~40) for 8-10. Tendon first — do not chase weight.

d9.note: Lead with the LEFT (weaker) and match reps. ~15.

d10.note: Pain-free here — go up to ~47.5-50 for 12-15, RIR2.

d11.note: OMIT this week — tendon twinged last time. Reintroduce only when fully pain-free. Use the Skipped/Pain flag.

e4.note: Goblet squat 4-0-X: 4s down, EXPLODE up. Depth = pain-free range only.

e7.note: Now possible with mini-bands — most ski-specific pattern in the program. Toes forward, full tripod.

e8.note: Balance reaches — LEFT leg is priority. Eyes closed if it gets easy.

e9.note: Lateral step-up 4-6in: push through the working leg, slow lower.
